name: nowsdk-pm
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the nowsdk-pm plugin — a ServiceNow Senior Architect: design a new app, align to an existing project, or bootstrap an example; deliver live (with auth) or fully offline. Requires the latest Now SDK.

plugins.name: nowsdk-pm
plugins.description: ServiceNow Senior Architect. Design a new app (whole-platform architecture & design / AFU with delivery channels: Fluent offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform), align to an existing project's docs and support its evolution, or bootstrap an example project. Run bare for the menu — a description is optional. Requires the latest Now SDK; delivers live (with auth) or fully offline as a no-auth Update Set XML.
